name: Pasta Alla Checca (Pasta with Steeped Tomato
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Kalamata olives, pitted and halved
20 Fresh basil leaves, torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Seed and chop the tomatoes.
2. Place the chopped tomatoes, capers, olives, basil, 2 tablespoons olive oil, generous amount of black pepper, and minced garlic into a ceramic bowl. Cover with plastic wrap and place in direct sunlight for 2-3 hours (or at room temperature for 3-4 hours).
3. Add the remaining olive oil to the cooked pasta, mix well, add the steeped tomato mixture, mix again, and enjoy! Serves one.
Boun Appetito!
